title: Node.js Basics Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of the V8 engine, non-blocking I/O, and its role as a server-side JavaScript runtime for fullstack engineering.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily role of Node.js in modern development?
options: A JavaScript runtime environment that allows you to execute JavaScript code on the server instead of in a browser.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Which browser's JavaScript engine is Node.js built upon for high performance?
Is Node.js 'non-blocking' and 'event-driven'?
options: Yes, as it uses an asynchronous model that allows it to handle many simultaneous connections efficiently.
No, it only executes one thing at a time synchronously.

questions.question: Which command would you use to run a JavaScript file called 'index.js' in Node.js?
Does using Node.js allowing you to build truly Fullstack applications using only one programming language (JavaScript)?
options: Yes, by using JavaScript for both the frontend (browser) and backend (server).
